aiResponse.unifiedPurpose: The BootstrapService coordinates remote service lifecycle execution stages, specifically managing the initialization and teardown of the local CGS workspace.

originHistory.summary: Created whole in a single commit (79fac6e) during initial remote service scaffolding and workspace configuration.

usagePattern.summary: Registered as a Fastify decorator at plugin load time to serve as a shared application-wide service, alongside typing enhancements to expose it on the FastifyInstance interface.

architecturalIntent.summary: App-wide singleton lifecycle manager registered as a Fastify decorator. It orchestrates the workspace service initialization and destruction phases during service boot and shutdown.
notes: GAP: PR bodies and issues contain no detailed prose explanation, relying solely on brief issue/PR titles for context.

issues.title: Remote Service Scaffolding + CGS repo cloning capability
